chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 16 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.1395/2020 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 3. For orders on MA No.1396/2020 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of bail application 10.03.2020 Mr. Rizwan Ahmed Jagirani, Advocate for applicants / accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicants / accused Muhammad Afzal and Touheed Ahmed seek protective bail in Crime No.120/2019 registered at P.S Kandhra, District Sukkur for offences under Sections 295, 295-A, 337-A(i), 147, 149, PPC. In the challan, Section 7, Anti-Terrorism Act, 1997 has been added and applicants / accused have been shown as absconders. It is submitted that applicants / accused are prepared to surrender before the trial Court, but apprehend their arrest as NBWs have been issued against them. Serious mala fide on the part of the complainant and police have been alleged. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail for a period of four days is granted to the applicant / accused subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (fifty thousand) each and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of NBWs is suspended for a period of four days. Applicants / accused are directed to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have effect after expiry of four days or whenever the applicants / accused surrender before the trial Court, which one occurs earlier. It is made clear that in case, applicants / accused fail to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period, their bail bonds shall stand automatically forfeited.

This order shall cease to have effect after expiry of four days or whenever the applicants / accused surrender before the trial Court, which one occurs earlier. It is made clear that in case, applicants / accused fail to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period, their bail bonds shall stand automatically forfeited. Criminal Bail application along with the listed applications stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
